evals.prompt: 我想對 <project-root> 這個 Yii 1.1 專案做一次安全審計。主要想知道：CSRF 防護有沒有開啟？accessRules 有沒有缺口？以及有沒有 SQL injection 的風險。請執行 yii1-security-audit。
evals.expected_output: 審計報告應包含：(1) Yii 1.1 框架識別證據至少 3 項，(2) CSRF enableCsrfValidation 設定查閱結果，(3) 至少一個 Controller 的 accessRules 或 filters() 分析，(4) SQL 注入搜尋結果（區分安全綁定 vs 拼接），(5) 每條發現有類型碼 + 檔名:行號 + 修復建議，(6) 至少一個 PoC 觀察框架

assertions.text: Output mentions at least 3 Yii 1.1 identification signals (yiic.php OR CController OR protected/ OR config/main.php)
Output explicitly mentions enableCsrfValidation and its current value or absence in main.php
Output includes AccessControl or accessRules analysis with at least one specific controller file named
Output distinguishes between safe :param binding and unsafe SQL concatenation/interpolation
Output uses risk type codes (AUTH, CSRF, XSS, SQL, CFG, LOGIC, or FILE) for at least 2 findings
At least one finding includes a specific file path and line number reference
Output contains at least one observable PoC framework (request path + expected vs actual)
Fix recommendations use Yii 1.1 APIs (CHtml::encode, CDbCommand, createCommand, accessRules, etc.) not generic PHP or Yii2
Fix recommendations do NOT use Html::encode() (Yii2), Yii::$app, or can() without mentioning checkAccess

evals.prompt: 幫我找 <project-root>/protected/controllers/ 下的 Controller 有沒有漏掉加 accessRules 或 filters 的？如果有的話哪些 action 是公開的而且有危險？
evals.expected_output: 應列出缺少 filters() 的 Controller 清單，指出具體哪些 action 無鑑權保護，映射到 AUTH 類型碼，並建議如何添加 accessRules()

assertions.text: Output names at least 3 specific controller PHP files from protected/controllers/
Output identifies at least one controller lacking filters() or accessRules()
Output uses AUTH type code for access control findings
Output mentions checkPermission filter (<your-project> base controller mechanism)
Each risk finding includes a specific controller file path

evals.prompt: 這個 <your-project> 專案的 CDbCommand 使用方式安不安全？有沒有直接把 $POST 或 $GET 的值拼進 SQL 字串的地方？幫我掃一下 protected/controllers/ 和 protected/models/。
evals.expected_output: 應搜尋 createCommand() 的使用，區分安全的 :param 綁定與不安全的字串拼接，對不安全的每一處給出位置（檔名:行號）、原始代碼片段、SQL injection 類型碼，以及安全重寫的建議

assertions.text: Output explicitly searches for and discusses createCommand() usage patterns
Output explicitly differentiates safe patterns (bindParam/bindValue/inline params) from unsafe patterns (concatenation)
SQL type code used for unsafe findings
At least one unsafe finding includes the actual code snippet from the project
At least one finding includes a parameterized query rewrite suggestion using Yii 1.1 API
